Maya Yoga

Uniquely Authentic

Namaste! I am an experienced yoga teacher with over two decades of practice, dedicated to making yoga accessible to individuals of all ages and skill levels. My mission is to empower and inspire others through the transformative practice of yoga, fostering balance, strength, and well-being in everyday life.

Background

I hold a Post Graduate Diploma in Yoga Science from the Morarji Desai National Institute of Yoga and a Master’s degree from Uttaranchal Sanskrit University. As the founder of Maya Yoga, I have led numerous workshops, training programs, and wellness initiatives, promoting holistic well-being. I also had the honor of serving as a Teacher of Indian Culture at the Consulate General of India in Johannesburg, furthering my mission to share the transformative power of yoga worldwide.
